name: School Bus 1
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue Business Name Search (interactive, not directly accessible)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). Multiple SAFER keyword searches for 'SCHOOL BUS 1' returned no records. NJ DOE school bus contractor lists do not show a 'School Bus 1' entity in Essex County; NJSBCA member directory has no match starting with 'S' in Montclair/Essex. The listed address 28 Valley Rd, Montclair NJ 07042 is adjacent to Montclair Public Schools Transportation office at 22 Valley Rd, suggesting either a small intrastate operator/sole prop, a recently-formed entity not in public school contractor directories, or possibly a stale/incorrect listing. Could not confirm in NJ entity database via WebFetch (interactive portal required).

name: Door 2 Door School Shuttle LLC
registry_source: BBB profile (Door 2 Door Shuttle, The Colony TX); Alignable; LinkedIn
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). SAFER keyword searches for 'DOOR 2 DOOR', 'DOOR 2 DOOR SHUTTLE', and 'DOOR 2 DOOR SCHOOL' all returned no records. The previously seen USDOT 2428176 for a 'Door 2 Door' record is INACTIVE in SAFER and not confirmed as this company. The operating brand is 'Door 2 Door Shuttle' (DBA Door 2 Door School Shuttle), an LLC operated by Brenda Hoxie/Saunders, founded 4/20/2016, located at 5780 Crestwood Ln, The Colony TX 75056 (BBB) — the listed address 7065 Fox Dr likely is/was an alternate or older address. Services: airport/group/school shuttle; ~10 years in business. Likely TX intrastate-only carrier (school shuttle / contract carriage).

name: Castro School Trnsprtn Inc
registry_source: NJ Department of Education School Bus Contractor Code lists (Bergen County)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). SAFER searches for 'CASTRO SCHOOL', 'CASTRO TRNSPRTN', 'CASTRO TRANS' returned no records; broader 'CASTRO' SAFER list contains no NJ school-bus entity. 'Castro Transport LLC' (USDOT 3792774) is a Newark NJ general-freight carrier at 86 Somme St — DIFFERENT entity, not this school bus operator. Castro School Trans, Inc. is listed on NJ Department of Education School Bus Contractor Code documents (Bergen County, Garfield NJ), confirming active intrastate school bus operations. Per protocol intrastate-only school bus contractors in NJ are commonly NOT registered with FMCSA. NJ entity registry (Division of Revenue) requires interactive lookup; inc date and officers not directly retrievable here.

name: Chool Bus

notes: NOT A SCHOOL BUS / TRANSPORT OPERATOR. 'Chool Bus LLC' (choolbus.net) is a math tutoring / test-prep service in the Dallas/Cedar Hill TX area, run by Ms. Remi. Phone (469) 708-5618. Services: math tutoring, skill building, college test prep, Math Summer Bridge. No FMCSA presence (none expected — not a motor carrier). Should be excluded from Summit's tuck-in target universe (false positive in source list, likely from name-matching error). SAFER keyword searches confirm no match.

name: Midstate School Bus
fmcsa_address: 216 West 1st Street, Wayne, NE (HQ); operating location 1000 Race St Ste 3, Plattsmouth NE 68048
officers: Acquired by First Student (2021) — currently operated as First Student Plattsmouth; Location Manager: Kerri Gochenour
entity_status: acquired/inactive under original name; operating location active under First Student
registry_source: FMCSA SAFER (USDOT 1211484); D&B Plattsmouth directory; First Student press release; Plattsmouth Community School District
notes: This listing reflects Mid States School Bus, Inc. (USDOT 1211484, MC-614840), HQ Wayne NE, est. 2004 with ~191 buses serving ~20 districts in eastern NE/SD. ACQUIRED by First Student (FirstGroup) in March 2021; now operates as the First Student Plattsmouth depot at 1000 Race St Ste 3, Plattsmouth NE 68048 (the exact address in the source list). USDOT record is INACTIVE — last MCS-150 filed 2021-07-16 (consistent with rollup into First Student's existing USDOT). NOT a viable tuck-in (already part of First Student). The 'Midstate' label appears to be a colloquial/legacy variant of 'Mid States'.
